identity.name: IDSEA Digital Platform
universal_rules: Use Poppins for all Headings (Client Mandate).
Use Inter for Body text to ensure readability in dense scientific content.
Admin Sidebar MUST be #0c3c60 with #1e7a4d hover states.
Public pages should feel organic and open (Cream/White backgrounds).
Admin pages should be dense and functional (Slate/Gray backgrounds).
NO gradients on the Admin Sidebar (Flat Navy).
All interactive elements must have data-testid.

primary.description: Deep Navy - Used for Admin Sidebar, Footer, Primary Text

secondary.description: Growth Green - Used for Buttons, Table Headers, Sidebar Hover, Accents

accent.description: Golden Amber - Used for Awards, Highlights, Warmth

public.hero: Split layout: Left content (H1+CTA), Right Image with organic mask or rounded-xl.
public.grid: Bento Grid for Stats (Navy/Green blocks mixed with White).
public.spacing: Generous padding (py-16 or py-24) between sections.

admin.table_style: Header bg-[#1e7a4d] text-white rounded-t-lg overflow-hidden. Rows white with hover:bg-slate-50.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1e7a4d] text-white hover:bg-[#166534] rounded-md px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0c3c60] border border-[#0c3c60] hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-6 py-2

cards.public: bg-white border-none shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 rounded-xl overflow-hidden group
cards.admin: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-6

tables.header: bg-[#1e7a4d] text-white font-semibold uppercase text-xs tracking-wider

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px for elegant look. 2px for Admin UI.

sidebar.logo_area: h-16 flex items-center justify-center border-b border-[#1e7a4d]/30

general: Strictly adhere to the client's color palette for the Admin Panel.
Use 'Poppins' font class for all headings (h1-h6).
Ensure the public website feels distinct from the admin panel (Marketing vs Utility).
Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout for the Home Page statistics section.
file_structure: Create reusable components in /src/components/ui/ (Button, Card, Input).
Place Admin components in /src/components/admin/ (Sidebar, Topbar, AdminTable).
Place Public components in /src/components/public/ (Navbar, Footer, Hero).

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for public site overlays.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
